title: Coursera India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Coursera India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
